purpose: Byte-faithful local replica of the live v2.2 origin (https://pdd-monkeytype.pdd-typing.workers.dev) for validator authoring on egress-restricted hosts.
why: O-UI-005 pins the screenshot baseline to the live v2.2 origin. The validator-authoring sandbox blocks general outbound fetch (see docs/09-cloudflare-deployment.md: 'the Code-Mode execute sandbox blocks general outbound fetch'), so the baseline is captured from this replica. The live origin serves these exact bytes: the Cloudflare Worker embeds implementation/public/* + the isomorphic engine modules (worker/README.md, docs/09).

pinned_assets.note: frontend last changed in beb6cff, before the v2.2 deploy (076d6a2)
verified byte-equal to live GET /style.css (fetched via egress-capable tool, 2026-07-19)
frontend last changed in beb6cff, before the v2.2 deploy
engine v1.0.0 semantics (pre-CA-001 backspace retreat, d68a4a1); v2.2 predates the v1.1.0 engine

api_stubs: serve.mjs stubs same-origin /api/* with pinned, schema-shaped responses (signup/login, quotes/random pinned text, results POST 201, config GET, leaderboards empty) so the frontend is fully exercisable offline.
engine_semantics: v1.0 (no backspace retreat); run the suite with --engine-semantics=v1.0 against this replica
